task: Write a Python function that validates an AWS IAM role ARN string and returns True if valid, False otherwise. An ARN should follow the pattern: arn:aws:iam::account-id:role/role-name
Create a JSON object representing an AWS S3 bucket policy that allows public read access to all objects in the bucket named 'my-public-bucket'
Write a regular expression that matches valid AWS EC2 security group IDs, which follow the pattern 'sg-' followed by exactly 8 or 17 hexadecimal characters (e.g., sg-0123abcd or sg-0123456789abcdef0)
